title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: New Microsoft tool lets devs spin up AI behavior tests using text descriptions
summary: Microsoft on Tuesday took the wraps off Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing, an open-source framework for spinning up AI evaluations.

title: Ex-Anduril engineer raises $42M to build the Amazon of composite parts
summary: Layup Parts co-founder Zack Eakin has drawn on a motorsports background, and his experience working for Palmer Luckey and Elon Musk, to tackle making faster, cheaper, and better composites.

title: OpenAI launches new Codex tools for white-collar work
summary: OpenAI released a set of six plug-ins aimed at specific jobs: data analytics, creative production, sales, product design, equity investing, and investment banking. Available from within the Codex app, each of the new tools bundles integrations, instructions, and context to allow

title: Anthropic Expands Access to Claude Mythos After AI Giant Files for IPO
summary: Just a day after the nearly $1 trillion AI giant revealed IPO plans, Anthropic is letting more firms access its powerful Claude Mythos model.

title: Anthropic scales Claude Mythos  to critical infrastructure in 15+ countries
summary: Anthropic is expanding Project Glasswing, its security vulnerability program, and access to Mythos to 150 organizations across 15 countries — targeting critical infrastructure in power, water, healthcare, and communications where a cyberattack could affect 100 million people.

title: EdgeX blames ‘external party’ for token crash as ZachXBT alleges insider manipulation
summary: Onchain investigator ZachXBT claims decentralized exchange edgeX insiders controlled nearly the entire supply with a thin float.

title: Crossmint enables Visa card payments for AI agents and autonomous commerce
summary: The new API lets AI agents make purchases with eligible Visa cards using tokenized credentials and spending controls, expanding payment options for autonomous software.

title: 美國佛羅里達州起訴OpenAI，指控其容許ChatGPT協助和教唆大規模槍擊案
summary: 佛羅里達州總檢察長烏斯邁爾指控OpenAI及其首席執行官山姆·阿爾特曼構建了一張「欺騙之網」。

title: TON Price Pumps After Telegram CEO Says Token Will Be Rebranded to Gram
summary: Telegram is taking the reins of The Open Network, years after abandoning the project—and it plans to adopt Toncoin's originally planned name.

title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Warns $1.75 Billion IPO Investors of Potential Future Share Dilution
summary: SpaceX's amended IPO filing signals the company may issue substantial new shares in future transactions as Elon Musk expands its ambitions.

title: Florida Sues OpenAI, Sam Altman Over ChatGPT Safety Claims
summary: Florida's attorney general seeks damages, restrictions on ChatGPT, and personal liability for OpenAI CEO Sam Altman in what the state describes as the first state-led lawsuit against the AI company.

title: FAA documents outline SpaceX plans for Starfall reentry vehicles
summary:
Federal Aviation Administration documents have provided new details about a SpaceX project to develop and test reentry vehicles that could be used to support in-space manufacturing projects.
